case_title: WILLIAM CAMBA SR. VS. ERIC HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMBA SR., WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ERIC HERNANDEZ, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 675 MOSCOW ST., 2ND FLOOR, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ERIC HERNANDEZ, MICHELLE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ERIC HERNANDEZ, MICHELLE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMBA SR., WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ERIC HERNANDEZ, MICHELLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
